allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/contact -F "name=test" -F "email=test@test.com" -F "reason=general" -F "subject=test" -F "message=hello world test message" -F "honeypot=")

Bash(curl -s -w "\\n%{http_code}" -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/contact -F "name=test" -F "email=test@test.com" -F "reason=general" -F "subject=test" -F "message=hello world test message" -F "honeypot=" -L)

Bash(curl -s -w "\\n%{http_code}" -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/contact -F "name=test" -F "email=test@test.com" -F "reason=general" -F "subject=test" -F "message=hello world test message" -F "honeypot=")
